pages.name: Home
pages.description: Main landing page introducing the engraving shop and linking to key shopping and service areas, with featured products and quick entry points into core flows like Kitchen, Drinkware, Weddings, Gift Finder, Store Pickup, and Custom Projects.
primary_functions: Provide global search bar to search for products (e.g., 'engraved phone stand').
Link directly to main shopping categories like Kitchen & Cutting Boards and Drinkware & Tumblers.
Link to specialty flows such as Gift Finder, Store Pickup, Corporate & Bulk Orders, and Custom Projects.
Show featured and popular products with quick access to product detail pages.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Kitchen & Cutting Boards' in the main content or header navigation.
Click on 'Drinkware & Tumblers' in the main content or header navigation.
Click on a Weddings-focused promo tile or 'Occasions – Weddings' in the header.
Click on a featured or popular product card.
Submit the global search bar (e.g., 'engraved phone stand').
Click on the Gift Finder call-to-action section.
Click on Corporate & Bulk Orders promo tile.
Click on Store Pickup / Same-Day Pickup promo tile.
Click on Custom Projects & Consultation promo tile.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Home' header navigation link.
Accessible via the 'Home' footer link.
Primary entry URL for the site (root or index.html).

pages.name: Category Listing
pages.description: Reusable product listing page for browsing products within a specific category or occasion such as kitchen_cutting_boards, drinkware_tumblers, or weddings, with filters and sorting.
primary_functions: Display products for a given category (e.g., kitchen_cutting_boards, drinkware_tumblers, weddings).
Provide filters such as Material, Size, Capacity, Product Type, Style/Theme, Rating, and Price range.
Offer sorting options including Price: Low to High, Price: High to Low, Most Popular, and Customer Rating.
Allow users to click a product card to open its Product Detail page in the same or a new tab.

incoming_params.description: Category identifier to determine which products to show, e.g., 'kitchen_cutting_boards', 'drinkware_tumblers', 'weddings'.
Optional material filter value, e.g., 'bamboo', 'stainless_steel'.
Optional size filter, e.g., 'Medium (12 x 16 in)'.
Optional capacity filter for drinkware, e.g., 20.
Optional product type filter, e.g., 'cutting_board', 'welcome_sign_plaque'.
Optional style filter such as 'rustic'.
Minimum average star rating filter, e.g., 4.
Maximum price filter in USD, e.g., 60.
Optional minimum price filter in USD.
Sort option key, e.g., 'price_asc', 'price_desc', 'most_popular', 'rating_desc'.
Current results page for pagination.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on any product card in the list.
Apply or update any filter/sort option.

access_methods.description: Accessed via header links such as 'Kitchen & Cutting Boards', 'Drinkware & Tumblers', or 'Occasions – Weddings', which pass different categoryId values.
Directly accessible by visiting category.html with a categoryId query parameter.

pages.name: Search Results
pages.description: Search results page for keyword searches initiated from the site-wide search bar, supporting filters and sorting over search results.
primary_functions: Display products matching a search query (e.g., 'engraved phone stand').
Offer filters such as Material (e.g., Walnut, Maple), Price, Rating, and other relevant attributes.
Provide sorting options such as Price: Low to High and Customer Rating.
Allow opening product detail pages in the current tab or a new tab for comparison.

incoming_params.description: Free-text search query entered by the user, e.g., 'engraved phone stand'.
Optional material filter such as 'walnut' or 'maple'.
Optional style filter such as 'minimal'.
Minimum average rating filter.
Maximum price filter in USD.
Optional minimum price filter in USD.
Sort key such as 'price_asc' or 'rating_desc'.
Current page number for paginated search results.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a search result product card (opens in same tab).
Ctrl/Cmd+click on a search result product card (opens in new tab, handled by browser).
Apply or adjust filters or sorting on the search results page.

access_methods.description: Reached after submitting the global search bar, which navigates to search.html?query=... .

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed page for a single product, supporting configuration, personalization, selection of shipping/pickup and key actions such as add to cart, add to wishlist, or request bulk quote.
primary_functions: Show full product information including images, description, price, size, material, and star rating.
Provide configuration options such as size, color, style/theme, font choice, wood finish, and capacity where applicable.
Offer personalization fields for engraving or text (e.g., family name, messages, multiple name fields for pens).
Allow selection of quantity and variant-specific options (e.g., ink color, engraving style like 'Minimal', font 'Script 2').
When relevant, display shipping and delivery options, including lowest-priced choices within target delivery windows (e.g., under 10 business days).
Support adding the configured product to the cart with standard shipping or for pickup at a selected store.
Provide an 'Add to Wishlist' action to save customized products to the Wishlist page.
Expose a 'Request Bulk Quote' button for eligible items, linking to the Bulk Quote Request page with the product context.

incoming_params.description: Product ID to display, used to load full product details and configuration options.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Cart' or cart icon after successfully adding an item to the cart.
Click 'View Wishlist' after successfully adding the configured product to the wishlist.
Click the 'Request Bulk Quote' button on a bulk-eligible product.

access_methods.description: Accessed via product.html?id={productId} from listings, search, Gift Finder, Store Pickup, or other flows.

pages.name: Shopping Cart
pages.description: Page where users review and adjust items they have added before proceeding to checkout, including personalized details and shipping/pickup info.
primary_functions: Display all items added to the cart, including personalization summaries and selected options.
Allow updating quantities or removing items from the cart.
Show price breakdown including item subtotals and estimated shipping or pickup information where available.
Provide a path to proceed to checkout (even though checkout flow is out of scope for the current tasks).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product name or image in the cart to view/edit its details (in a new tab or same tab).
Click 'Continue Shopping' from the cart page.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Cart' icon/link in the header navigation.
Accessed when redirecting after adding a product to cart and choosing to view the cart.

pages.name: Wishlist
pages.description: Page for viewing and managing products that the user has saved for later, including customized items and their key personalization details.
primary_functions: List all products saved with the 'Add to Wishlist' action, preserving key personalization details such as text and selected options.
Allow removing items from the wishlist.
Provide a way to move or copy wishlist items into the shopping cart for purchase.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a wishlist product title or image to revisit its product detail page.
Click 'View Cart' after moving/copying a wishlist item into the cart.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Wishlist' header navigation link.
Accessible after adding an item to wishlist and following a 'View Wishlist' CTA.

pages.name: Corporate & Bulk Orders
pages.description: Overview page for corporate gifts, promotional items, and large-quantity orders, with category sections for bulk-friendly products and entry into bulk quote flows.
primary_functions: Explain bulk ordering options, discounts, and typical use cases for corporate clients.
Provide category or section selection for bulk-friendly product types such as 'Keychains & Accessories'.
List bulk-orderable products (e.g., Aluminum Logo Keychain) and link to their Product Detail pages.
Highlight the availability of bulk quote requests from relevant product pages.

incoming_params.description: Optional corporate/bulk category filter, e.g., 'keychains_accessories'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Select a corporate/bulk category such as 'Keychains & Accessories'.
Click on a specific bulk-eligible product like 'Aluminum Logo Keychain'.
Click a 'Request Bulk Quote' CTA directly from a bulk product listing tile (if provided).

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Corporate & Bulk Orders' header navigation link.
Accessible via the 'Corporate & Bulk Orders' footer link.

pages.name: Bulk Quote Request
pages.description: Form page for submitting a detailed bulk quote request tied to a specific product and quantity, used for corporate and bulk inquiries.
primary_functions: Display key product context (e.g., Aluminum Logo Keychain) and the requested quantity passed from the product page.
Collect company information such as Company Name (e.g., 'Brightline Studios').
Capture budget details (e.g., a $300 budget) and desired quantity (e.g., 50 units).
Allow selection of a timeline option (e.g., 'Need in 30 days') from a dropdown.
Provide a large text area for project details and engraving requirements on both sides.
Submit the quote request and provide a confirmation message to the user.

incoming_params.description: The product ID for which a bulk quote is being requested.
The number of units requested in the bulk quote, e.g., 50.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Form validation errors; reload page with same context to correct mistakes.
Optional: after successful submission, follow 'Back to Home' or similar CTA from the confirmation message.

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Request Bulk Quote' buttons on product or Corporate & Bulk Orders pages, passing productId and quantityRequested.
Form submission stays on the same page and shows a confirmation or error message.

pages.name: Gift Finder
pages.description: Guided shopping tool tailored to occasions and constraints such as budget, rating, and gift wrapping, surfacing curated giftable products.
primary_functions: Let users choose an occasion (e.g., Anniversary) to focus gift suggestions.
Provide filters for maximum price, rating (e.g., 4 stars & up), and additional options like 'Free gift wrapping available'.
Offer sorting options such as 'Customer Rating: High to Low'.
Display a results list of suitable gifts and link to each products detail page.
Support configuring an anniversary gift under a budget with personalization and gift wrap options via the Product Detail page.

incoming_params.description: Selected gift occasion, e.g., 'anniversary'.
Maximum price filter for gifts, e.g., 40.
Minimum average rating filter, e.g., 4.
If true, restricts results to products that have free gift wrapping available.
Sorting key such as 'rating_desc' (Customer Rating: High to Low).
Current page number for paginated gift results.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Apply Gift Finder filters and sorting.
Click on a suggested gift product card to personalize and purchase.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Gift Finder' header navigation link.
Accessible via the 'Gift Finder' footer link.

pages.name: Store Pickup
pages.description: Location-based page for finding products eligible for in-store or same-day pickup, including store selection by ZIP and pickup-eligible product listings.
primary_functions: Allow users to enter a ZIP code (e.g., 94103) and select a store from suggested locations.
After store selection, list pickup-eligible products for that store.
Provide filters including category (e.g., 'Pens & Office'), price caps (e.g., max $25), and rating (e.g., 4 stars & up).
Highlight products with 'Same-day pickup' eligibility in the product list.
Allow users to click through to the Product Detail page for configuration and 'Add for Pickup at Selected Store'.

incoming_params.description: Optional ZIP code entered by the user, e.g., '94103'.
Optional filter for pickup-eligible category, e.g., 'pens_office'.
Maximum price filter for pickup products, e.g., 25.
Minimum rating filter, e.g., 4.
If true, restricts list to same-day pickup-eligible products.
Sorting key for pickup product list.
Current page for paginated pickup-eligible products.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit ZIP code search for nearby pickup locations.
Apply filters/sorting on pickup-eligible product list after a store is selected.
Click on a pickup-eligible product to configure it on the Product Detail page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Store Pickup' header navigation link.
Accessible via the 'Store Pickup' footer link.

pages.name: Custom Projects & Consultation
pages.description: Showcase for complex or large custom work with an embedded design consultation request form for projects like carved wall art and large signs.
primary_functions: Describe custom project capabilities such as large wall art, carved maps, and fully bespoke designs.
Feature a prominent 'Schedule Design Consultation' call-to-action that scrolls to the consultation form on the same page.
Provide a form to choose project type (e.g., 'Wall Art & Large Signs'), date, and time for an appointment.
Allow users to select consultation format such as 'Video Call'.
Collect project description details including dimensions, style needs, and budget constraints.
Capture user contact information (name, email) and preferred contact method (e.g., Email).
Submit the appointment request and display a confirmation or next steps.

incoming_params.description: Optional project type prefill for the consultation form, e.g., 'wall_art_large_signs'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Schedule Design Consultation' from a hero section that may preselect a project type.
Optional: follow a 'Back to Home' or 'Continue Shopping' CTA after successful appointment request.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Custom Projects' header navigation link.
Accessible via the 'Custom Projects' footer link.
Linked from promotional content on other pages describing custom wall art or large sign projects.

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background information about the engraving shop and its craftsmanship, including materials, techniques, and story.
primary_functions: Explain the shops story, values, and experience in custom engraving and carving.
Highlight materials, equipment, and quality standards used for products like cutting boards, tumblers, and wall art.
Reassure users about reliability for weddings, corporate gifts, and special occasions.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a 'Contact Us' link within About content.
Click on a CTA to learn more about custom projects from the About page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'About' footer link.
May be linked from external profiles or search results for users wanting to learn about the business.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact page for general questions, special requests, and support, with contact form and business details.
primary_functions: Provide a contact form for inquiries not covered by bulk quotes or custom project forms.
Display business contact details such as phone number, email address, and physical location.
Show operating hours and basic directions or map to the workshop or store.

incoming_params.description: Optional subject prefill for the contact form, e.g., 'Question about engraving limits'.
Optional order reference to prefill in the contact form if coming from an order-related help link.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Reload page after validation errors while preserving entered subject and order reference.
Optional: follow a 'Return to Home' CTA after successful inquiry submission.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Contact' footer link.
Linked from About, Help, and other pages for general inquiries.

pages.name: Help & FAQs
pages.description: Central help resource with common questions and policies regarding personalization, shipping, returns, and site features.
primary_functions: Answer frequently asked questions about personalization, engraving limits, and product care.
Explain shipping policies, including typical delivery windows, and how shipping options are presented on product pages.
Describe return, exchange, and cancellation policies for personalized items.
Provide guidance on using features like Wishlist, Gift Finder, and Store Pickup.

incoming_params.description: Optional FAQ topic filter, such as 'personalization', 'shipping', 'returns', or 'features'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Select a FAQ category or topic filter from the Help navigation within the page.
Click a 'Contact Us' link when FAQs do not resolve a question.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Help & FAQs' footer link.

pages.name: Legal & Privacy
pages.description: Legal information covering privacy, terms of use, and data practices, with content loaded per document type.
primary_functions: Present the privacy policy describing how user data and preferences are handled.
Outline terms of service and acceptable use of the website.
Provide information on cookies and tracking technologies, where applicable.

incoming_params.description: Specifies which legal document to display, e.g., 'privacy_policy', 'terms_of_service', or 'cookies_policy'. If omitted, a combined Legal & Privacy overview may be shown.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on in-page tabs or links such as 'Privacy Policy', 'Terms of Service', or 'Cookies Policy'.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Legal & Privacy' footer link.
May be linked directly for privacy or terms information, e.g., legal.html?document_type=privacy_policy.

header_links.description: Homepage with featured products and main navigation
Browse engraved kitchen items and cutting boards
Browse engraved stainless steel tumblers and drinkware
Wedding-focused products including welcome signs and plaques
Tool to find gifts by occasion, budget, rating, and wrapping options
Corporate gifting and bulk order information and products
Find products available for local and same-day pickup
Learn about and schedule custom wall art and large projects
View products saved to your wishlist
View and edit items in your shopping cart

footer_links.description: Learn more about our engraving shop
Get in touch with questions or requests
View frequently asked questions and support information
Information and products for corporate and bulk orders
Find the right gift by occasion and budget
See options for in-store and same-day pickup
